'''zochachaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:uliginose|uliginose]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-ch-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:uliginose|uliginose]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zochachaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zochachithi|zochachithi]] || [[word:zochachiji|zochachiji]] || [[word:zochachishi|zochachishi]] || [[word:zochachiki|zochachiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zochachuthuthu|zochachuthuthu]] || [[word:zochachujuju|zochachujuju]] || [[word:zochachushushu|zochachushushu]] || [[word:zochachukuku|zochachukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zochachuthu|zochachuthu]] || [[word:zochachuju|zochachuju]] || [[word:zochachushu|zochachushu]] || [[word:zochachuku|zochachuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zochachufthuf|zochachufthuf]] || [[word:zochachufjuf|zochachufjuf]] || [[word:zochachufshuf|zochachufshuf]] || [[word:zochachufkuf|zochachufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zochachethe|zochachethe]] || [[word:zochacheje|zochacheje]] || [[word:zochacheshe|zochacheshe]] || [[word:zochacheke|zochacheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zochachothotho|zochachothotho]] || [[word:zochachojojo|zochachojojo]] || [[word:zochachoshosho|zochachoshosho]] || [[word:zochachokoko|zochachokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zochachotho|zochachotho]] || [[word:zochachojo|zochachojo]] || [[word:zochachosho|zochachosho]] || [[word:zochachoko|zochachoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zochachofthof|zochachofthof]] || [[word:zochachofjof|zochachofjof]] || [[word:zochachofshof|zochachofshof]] || [[word:zochachofkof|zochachofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zochachĂŻfthĂŻf|zochachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zochachĂŻfjĂŻf|zochachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zochachĂŻfshĂŻf|zochachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zochachĂŻfkĂŻf|zochachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zochachĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|zochachĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zochachĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|zochachĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zochachĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|zochachĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zochachĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|zochachĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zochachĂŻfthĂŻf|zochachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zochachĂŻfjĂŻf|zochachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zochachĂŻfshĂŻf|zochachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zochachĂŻfkĂŻf|zochachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zochachĂŻfthĂŻf|zochachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zochachĂŻfjĂŻf|zochachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zochachĂŻfshĂŻf|zochachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zochachĂŻfkĂŻf|zochachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zochachĂŠthĂŠ|zochachĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:zochachĂŠjĂŠ|zochachĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:zochachĂŠshĂŠ|zochachĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:zochachĂŠkĂŠ|zochachĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zochachathatha|zochachathatha]] || [[word:zochachajaja|zochachajaja]] || [[word:zochachashasha|zochachashasha]] || [[word:zochachakaka|zochachakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zochachatha|zochachatha]] || [[word:zochachaja|zochachaja]] || [[word:zochachasha|zochachasha]] || [[word:zochachaka|zochachaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zochachafthaf|zochachafthaf]] || [[word:zochachafjaf|zochachafjaf]] || [[word:zochachafshaf|zochachafshaf]] || [[word:zochachafkaf|zochachafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:zochachasha|zochachasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:zochachshĂ«asha|zochachshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zochachroasha|zochachroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zochachmuasha|zochachmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:zochachyaasha|zochachyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozochachnkshĂ«asha|gozochachnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozochachnkroasha|gozochachnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozochachnkmuasha|gozochachnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozochachnkyaasha|gozochachnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:zochachachasha|zochachachasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zochachachshĂ«asha|zochachachshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zochachachroasha|zochachachroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zochachachmuasha|zochachachmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zochachachyaasha|zochachachyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozochachachnkshĂ«asha|gozochachachnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozochachachnkroasha|gozochachachnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozochachachnkmuasha|gozochachachnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozochachachnkyaasha|gozochachachnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:zechĂŠchasha|zechĂŠchasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zechĂŠchshĂ«asha|zechĂŠchshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zechĂŠchroasha|zechĂŠchroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zechĂŠchmuasha|zechĂŠchmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zechĂŠchyaasha|zechĂŠchyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozechĂŠchnkshĂ«asha|gozechĂŠchnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozechĂŠchnkroasha|gozechĂŠchnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozechĂŠchnkmuasha|gozechĂŠchnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozechĂŠchnkyaasha|gozechĂŠchnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:zochfachasha|zochfachasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zochfachshĂ«asha|zochfachshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zochfachroasha|zochfachroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zochfachmuasha|zochfachmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zochfachyaasha|zochfachyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozochfachnkshĂ«asha|gozochfachnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozochfachnkroasha|gozochfachnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozochfachnkmuasha|gozochfachnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozochfachnkyaasha|gozochfachnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
